prompt: Write 3 ad copy variants for ShieldAcademy cybersecurity training platform. Variant 1: Use AIDA framework. Variant 2: Use PAS framework. Variant 3: Use FAB framework. Target audience: CTOs at companies that recently suffered a data breach. Each variant should be 4-6 sentences. Label the framework and its sections.
assertions: Output contains exactly 3 variants using AIDA, PAS, and FAB frameworks respectively
AIDA variant has identifiable Attention, Interest, Desire, and Action sections
PAS variant has identifiable Problem, Agitate, and Solution sections
FAB variant has identifiable Features, Advantages, and Benefits sections
PAS Agitate section goes beyond surface-level — maps secondary consequences (board scrutiny, customer churn, regulatory fines, reputation damage) rather than just restating the problem
All 3 variants contain zero forbidden lexicon words
Framework names and section labels are explicitly shown in the output
Each variant is between 4-8 sentences (not too short, not bloated)
